approach: Scanned all 1397 ChiNext stocks (codes starting with 300/301) using mootdx to fetch daily K-line data. For each stock: (1) Retrieved last 15 trading days before 2024-09-30, (2) Split into first 10 days and last 5 days, (3) Calculated price range in first 10 days as (max_high - min_low) / min_low and checked if < 5%, (4) Counted how many of the last 5 days had closing prices above the highest close in first 10 days (required ≥3), (5) Verified that at least one breakout day had volume > 1.5x the average volume of first 10 days. No stocks met all three conditions simultaneously.
assumptions: Used highest close price (not highest high price) of first 10 days as the breakout threshold, as this is more conservative and aligns with typical breakout pattern definitions. Interpreted 'breakout day volume' as any day in the last 5 days where close > threshold must have volume amplification. The narrow range condition uses (high-low)/low as specified in the task prompt.
